name: photo-generator
description: v1.1.0 — Get a professional-grade photo from a plain-language description, without knowing what a key light or an 85mm prime is. A guided workflow turns your scene into a physics-aware Nano Banana Pro prompt — camera body, lens, lighting setup, and color grade chosen from a curated reference library — then generates the image directly via the Gemini API at the right aspect ratio for print, social, or hero-banner use. /photo-setup handles the API key (pasted into a local keys.env, never the chat) and an optional default house style; batch and variations modes cover shot lists and multiple takes. Standalone; runs on its own. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace.
